# `fixtures/` — binary fixtures

* `logo.bin` — 1024-byte deterministic pseudo-binary. Generated by
  the LCG sequence documented in `scripts/materialize_seed.sh`
  (`__regen_logo_bin__` helper). SHA-256:
  `9e2a27a8954347bc962997943a1727f1ba9919de4f3fb06af597028cc312bf62`.

The fixture exists so virtio-fs / vsock-RPC throughput on the
workspace mount, plus file-mode preservation through
`worktree-provision`, are exercised against a non-empty binary
payload (without requiring a real third-party asset).
